economic_notes: Council owns 100% of Tthets Ehk E Deli Society and Jean Marie River Development Corporation Ltd., and 14.3% of Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (equity method).
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). The nation is located in the Northwest Territories (NT). Consolidation includes Tthets Ehk E Deli Society (100%) and Jean Marie River Development Corporation Ltd. (100%) fully consolidated; Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.3%) accounted for by modified equity method as a long-term investment. Earnings (Loss) from Subsidiaries was -$45,150 in 2021 vs $104,026 in 2020. Total government transfers calculated as MACA + ISC + Dehcho First Nations + GNWT contributions = 2064124 + 499872 + 105872 + 382834 = 3052802 (rounded to 3052830 per statement rounding). Contributions repayable of $26,456 exists. No long-term debt identified. Accounts payable note shows $265,995 but balance sheet shows $265,992 (minor rounding). Current liabilities = accounts payable $265,992 + contributions repayable $26,456 = $292,448.
